observed_failure.surface: check-contract and check-skill against a nested Logic Writing target in an external repository
observed_failure.prior_local_claim: an explicit external target root preserves the target's current contract and static reference authority
observed_failure.observed_result: check-contract originally recompiled repository-relative paths from the member directory; a later focused audit also found that check-skill retried a missing canonical .agents/skills reference from a same-named member path while reporting fallback_used=false

root_cause_backpropagation.supported_cause: the public commands originally had no shared canonical repository/member binding; after the first repair, resolve_declared_reference still selected between canonical and member paths by existence for source-layout references
root_cause_backpropagation.would_have_failed_if: the existing executable-contract model separately prohibited repository-relative reference fallback instead of relying only on the binding report's caller-authored fallback_used=false projection
root_cause_backpropagation.new_model_item: external target checks bind one canonical repository root plus one exact member root and separately reject any missing repository-relative reference that would otherwise resolve from a same-named member copy

generalized_repair.rule: External target checks resolve all repository-relative material from the explicit canonical repository root and never retry from another root.
generalized_repair.observed_regression: a nested external current target passes check-contract with repository-relative model and check paths
generalized_repair.same_class_regression: the same nested target passes check-skill reference resolution, but a canonical reference or model path missing from the repository still fails when a same-named member copy exists; member escape blocks, removed target-root is rejected, and standalone dot remains current
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: the repair adds no compatibility alias, guessed root, portfolio replacement, frozen-runner change, installation, or router mutation

flowguard_model.result: 34 scenarios passed, including the explicit repository-relative reference fallback rejection

revalidation_evidence.remaining_gate: none inside the focused external-target binding scope; installation, router refresh, final full validation, release, and archive remain deliberately not run

claim_boundary: This review covers only explicit canonical repository/member binding for check-contract and check-skill. It does not prove installation, portfolio, router, full validation, release, or publication.
